title: US judge strikes down Trump's $100,000 fee on new H-1B visas: What it means
content: A US judge has blocked President Trump's $100,000 H-1B visa fee, deeming it an unauthorized tax. The ruling, a significant setback for the administration's immigration restrictions, found the fee exceeded congressional authority. This decision offers relief to employers and foreign professionals, particularly in India's tech sector, who faced prohibitive costs.

title: 'Organised factory of hate': India tears into Pakistan's 'Fitna al Hindustan' campaign at UN
content: India has strongly condemned Pakistan's alleged state-sponsored propaganda campaign at the United Nations, accusing Islamabad of labeling militant groups as 'Fitna al Hindustan' to deflect blame.  New Delhi highlighted Pakistan's internal challenges and military's influence, while also holding it responsible for civilian casualties in Afghanistan due to cross-border military operations.

title: Big relief for Khan Sir: Patna court stays arrest in coaching centre firing case
content: Educator Khan Sir received a reprieve as a Patna court stayed his arrest in a case involving an alleged firing at his coaching institute. The incident, linked to a rivalry, saw security guards claim they acted on his orders, leading to an FIR.

title: At 15, Vaibhav Sooryavanshi isn't just scoring runs — he's redefining batting
content: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi's record-breaking IPL 2026 season earned him a maiden India call-up at just 15. The left-hander amassed 776 runs and smashed 72 sixes, dismantling bowling attacks with a unique technique that allows him to dominate length, short and full deliveries alike. While yorkers offered some control, his remarkable adaptability and power suggest Indian cricket may have uncovered a generational talent.

title: Former judge’s daughter assaulted in UK, threats to family over ’24 verdict
content: Daughter of former Bombay High Court judge Gautam Patel received a death threat at her London home, weeks after a physical assault. The threats are linked to a 2024 judgment on the Dawoodi Bohra spiritual leader succession, with anonymous letters accusing the judge of fraud.

title: Federal data on H-1B visa application shows decline in filings by Google, Meta, Amazon
content: Tech giants like Google and Amazon are reducing H-1B visa filings, while AI leaders such as OpenAI and Nvidia are significantly increasing them. This surge reflects a fierce competition for top talent, with companies willing to pay more to secure specialized researchers. New policy changes, including higher fees and a lottery favoring experienced workers, are also shaping the landscape.

title: Buying a home? Check 10 hidden costs beyond advertised property price
content: Homebuyers often underestimate the true cost of purchasing a property. Beyond the sticker price, expect significant expenses like stamp duty, registration, parking, and property taxes. Don't forget moving, maintenance deposits, loan fees, and potential GST on under-construction homes. Interior work and brokerage fees also add up, making thorough budgeting crucial.

title: Stokes’s England captaincy under serious threat after nightclub incident
content: Ben Stokes’s England captaincy is under threat after he and Gus Atkinson allegedly broke a team curfew and became involved in a nightclub altercation following the win over New Zealand. The ECB is investigating, though sources say the players “were not the aggressors.” A security guard was injured, Stokes may miss the next Test, and Harry Brook is expected to captain.

title: Google AI CEO Demis Hassabis on AGI: Humans only have a few years left to prepare
content: Google DeepMind CEO Demis Hassabis warns humanity is on the cusp of Artificial General Intelligence, potentially within four years, urging immediate preparation. He views current AI agents as a societal stress test and highlights the risks of recursive self-improvement. Hassabis also criticized tech companies for laying off engineers, advocating for increased productivity instead.

title: Top stocks to buy or sell: Stock market recommendations for today - check list
content: Stock market recommendations: Kalyan Jewellers India, and Interglobe Aviation (IndiGo) are sell calls by Somil Mehta, Head of Retail Research at Mirae Asset ShareKhan for June 9, 2026. He recommends buying Fortis Healthcare.

title: Oil prices ease as Iran and Israel pause attacks; Brent, WTI retreat from recent highs
content: Oil prices dipped Tuesday as Iran and Israel paused attacks, easing immediate supply disruption fears. This followed a sharp rise on Monday amid renewed Middle East tensions. Despite the de-escalation, concerns linger over the Strait of Hormuz and Houthi actions impacting Red Sea shipping. OPEC+ agreed to boost output, but analysts doubt its effectiveness due to production struggles.

title: Yamal, Endrick, Guler: The young guns ready to storm FIFA World Cup 2026
content: The 2026 FIFA World Cup will have 48 nations, 104 matches and a thousand storylines, but nothing like the arrival of a new generation of players announcing themselves on the world's biggest stage. These are the players who watched the 2022 Qatar finals as schoolboys and are now walking into dressing rooms alongside Messi, Ronaldo and Mbappé. The expanded format means more room for young talent to showcase their game. Here are 10 under-21 players stepping onto the World Cup stage for the very first time.

title: Apple's next-gen intelligence: Key features to know in Photos, Safari and other apps
content: Apple's WWDC 2026 unveiled iOS 27 and more, powered by Apple Intelligence and a re-engineered Siri AI.  This privacy-focused system, built with Google's Gemini, offers on-device processing and "Private Cloud Compute." Key features include advanced photo editing, automated web browsing, and smarter home notifications, promising a more intuitive user experience.

title: Amid 'Peddi' controversy, Kangana Ranaut says, 'Women are objectified even if you go to local train'
content: In response to the 'Peddi' controversy, Kangana Ranaut highlighted the film industry's historical bias against women, pointing out that the objectification of women transcends cinema, reflecting broader societal challenges. While acknowledging past missteps in representation, she urged audiences to approach the topic with discernment, reminding them that sensuality and sexuality can serve as powerful artistic expressions. Read on to know more in detail.

title: Apple unveils iOS 27: Gemini Siri, softer Liquid Glass, speed boost for older iPhones
content: Apple unveiled iOS 27 at WWDC 2026 on Monday, framing the release as a year of fixes rather than reinvention. A new slider tames Liquid Glass, a rewritten CPU scheduler delivers measurable speed gains down to the iPhone 11, and the long-delayed Siri AI finally ships—built on Apple's next-gen Foundation Models, trained in partnership with Google's Gemini, with English rolling out first.

title: Vijay honours chess champion: CM felicitates Praggnanandhaa with Rs 50 lakh
content: Tamil Nadu Chief Minister Vijay honored chess prodigy R Praggnanandhaa for his historic Norway Chess Tournament win, presenting him with a Rs 50 lakh reward. The CM also engaged in a friendly chess match with the Grandmaster, who was impressed by Vijay's skills. Praggnanandhaa's mother and a minister were present during the felicitation.

title: OpenAI IPO: ChatGPT maker files paperwork, set to hit Wall Street soon
content: AI giant OpenAI has confidentially filed paperwork for an initial public offering (IPO) with the SEC, signaling a potential Wall Street debut. While details remain undisclosed, the move aligns with a wave of anticipated tech listings, offering investors a chance to buy into leading AI firms.

title: Patrick & Brittany Mahomes net worth 2026: Wealth, earnings & luxury life
content: Patrick Mahomes is embracing his quick recovery by enjoying sports with wife Brittany Mahomes. Their shared passion for sports extends to investments in various franchises. They co-own the Kansas City Current. The couple has been high school sweethearts. They have built a life together with three children and a luxurious Missouri mansion.

title: Gabrielle Union reveals why she nearly let Dwyane Wade go amid marriage struggles
content: Dwyane Wade, the NBA legend, and his wife, Gabrielle Union, prefer to live relatively private lives as they raise their daughter, Kaavia, together, as they continue to inspire billions around the world with their love and commitment that they have shown to each other. While Dwyane Wade and Gabrielle Union seem to be happy together, their marriage has been far from perfect.

title: Inside Simone Biles and Jonathan Owens’ $27M fortune and luxury life
content: Simone Biles and Jonathan Owens have an estimated combined net worth of $27 million in 2026. Simone accounts for about $25 million through endorsements, appearances, tours, and investments, while Jonathan’s $2 million comes mainly from NFL contracts. The couple also owns valuable real estate and enjoys a luxury lifestyle, helping secure their financial future beyond sports.

title: MHT CET 2026 PCB result released at cetcell.mahacet.org: Direct link to download scorecards here
content: The Maharashtra State Common Entrance Test Cell has released the MHT CET 2026 results for the Physics, Chemistry, and Biology group. Candidates can now download their scorecards from the official website, cetcell.mahacet.org, using their roll number and password. The results reflect personal information, exam details, marks, percentile, and merit rank.

title: NFL Trade Rumors: Lions, Ravens Emerge as Top Fits for Veteran Edge Rusher
content: NFL trade rumors continue to swirl around veteran pass rusher Emmanuel Ogbah as the former Jacksonville Jaguars defender remains unsigned ahead of training camp. With 53.5 career sacks and extensive playoff experience, Ogbah is emerging as an intriguing option for contenders seeking additional edge-rushing depth. The Detroit Lions have been identified as a strong potential fit, while other teams could enter the conversation as roster needs evolve. Here’s a closer look at the latest speculation, insider analysis, contract outlook, and what could be next for the veteran defensive end in 2026.

title: 'Peddi' box office Day 5: Ram Charan and Janhvi starrer narrowly misses Rs 250 cr global mark
content: Ram Charan's 'Peddi' has achieved a strong opening, nearing Rs 250 crore worldwide despite criticism over Janhvi Kapoor's character portrayal. The film earned Rs 169.70 crore net in India and Rs 47 crore overseas by its fifth day. Despite a dip on first Monday, the mass actioner continues to draw crowds to theatres. Read on to know more in detail.

title: Quote of the day by Steve Jobs: ‘Vision pulls you when you care about work,'
content: Steve Jobs' perspective highlights that true commitment stems from a compelling vision, not just external pressure. When work feels meaningful, individuals are intrinsically driven, overcoming challenges and maintaining focus long after initial excitement wanes. This internal pull fosters resilience and sustained effort, proving vision to be a powerful career tool.

title: Digital 2.0: Access to mobiles up, but not empowerment
content: The first challenge was owning a phone. The next is about whether people can use it to access education, jobs, finance and welfare services

title: Heavy rain likely in Rayalaseema, South Coastal A.P. on June 9, 10
content: Several districts are likely to record day temperatures between 42°C and 43°, says Andhra Pradesh State Disaster Management Authority

title: APSRTC employees’ unions warn of stir over electric bus ‘privatisation’ plans
content: The government and APSRTC are bent on handing over electric buses, but also the bus depots to private operators on lease, say JAC convenors

title: Indian diaspora groups welcome court ruling striking down $100,000 H-1B visa fee
content: A federal judge on Monday (June 8, 2026) struck down the $100,000 fee imposed by U.S. President Donald Trump for H-1B applications

title: President Murmu to confer Padma awards on June 23
content: The President has approved the conferment of 131 Padma awards this year, including to actors Mammootty and R. Madhavan, as well as the late Satish Shah, whose kin will receive the honour posthumously

title: India at UNSC: Pakistan’s ‘Fitna al Hindustan’ narrative ‘officially sponsored misinformation’
content: India’s Permanent Representative to the UN, Ambassador Harish Parvathaneni, delivered a strong statement against Pakistan here during a UN Security Council meeting on the ‘Situation in Afghanistan’

title: West Bengal joins Ayushman Bharat scheme
content: “The portability feature of PM-JAY would be particularly beneficial for migrant workers from West Bengal and their families. Beneficiaries working or residing in other States would be able to access cashless treatment at nearby empanelled hospitals across the countr,’’ said Union Health Minister J.P. Nadda

title: CM Omar Abdullah seeks INDIA bloc’s support for J&K Statehood restoration
content: Jammu and Kashmir was reduced to a Union Territory in 2019 and its special status scrapped. The Supreme Court had called for early restoration of Statehood after 2024 Assembly election

title: Sabarimala ‘gold theft’: SIT submits report in Kerala High Court
content: It pertains to the investigation into the gold-plated/gold-clad copper plates of the temple, which had been sent to the National Metallurgical Laboratory, Jamshedpur, in March

title: India issues fresh Iran travel warning, urges citizens to leave
content: In view of the latest developments in the region, the Embassy advises all Indian nationals to avoid travel to Iran and those currently in Iran to exit the country using available transport

title: Rajya Sabha polls: M.P. Congress mulls moving MLAs away as BJP fields candidate on third seat
content: The BJP’s move pushed the Congress into alert mode with Leader of Opposition in the Assembly Umang Singhar hosting party MLAs and senior leaders over dinner at his residence and to discuss the election strategy.

title: Monsoon enters South Konkan, State advises farmers to defer sowing
content: The Agriculture and Disaster Management Department has forecast rainfall in parts of Sindhudurg and Ratnagiri districts until June 9; in other regions of Maharashtra, the monsoon’s progress and rainfall intensity are expected to remain low over the next week.

title: PDP leaders plough paddy fields to protest govt. takeover  of land from farmers in Pulwama
content: Shabir Ahmad, a farmer from Pulwama’s Padgampora, said small patches of 3-4 kanals of land were being utilised by locals to procure rice and feed for cattle; “If the government takes the land, it will have a severe impact on locals,” said Mr. Ahmad.

title: 28 lakh candidates for 32,679 vacancies: Oppn. attacks U.P. govt. over ‘mounting unemployment’
content: According to the Uttar Pradesh Police Recruitment and Promotion Board (UPPRPB), 28,86,797 candidates have applied to compete for 32,679 vacancies over three days (June 8, 9 and 10) across the State.

title: President Murmu confers 7 Kirti Chakras; IAF pilot, Gaganyatri Prasanth Nair among recipients
content: Lt. Commander Dilna K. and Lt. Commander Roopa A. of the Navy are among the Shaurya Chakra recipients after completion of Navika Sagar Parikrama II; Sepoy Janjal Pravin Prabhakar of the Mahar Regiment of Rashtriya Rifles and Lt. Shashank Tiwari of the Sikkim Scouts have been conferred the Kirti Chakra posthumously

title: SGPC gets visas for 541 Sikh pilgrims to travel to Pakistan on martyrdom anniversary of Guru Arjan Dev
content: During the visit, the pilgrims will pay obeisance at various historic Sikh shrines and participate in commemorative events before returning to India on June 19

title: INDIA bloc to take SIR complaints to CJI; seeks Pradhan’s immediate exit
content: It urges Centre to convene all-party meeting on current economic situation; parties question Congress for parting ways with DMK and for criticising then Pinarayi govt.

title: Toofan gains momentum as police intensify anti-drug operations in Ernakulam
content: Within Kochi city limits, police recorded 129 cases and arrested 145 accused under the NDPS Act in the week since the operation began on June 1. In Perumbavoor, 11 migrant labourers were arrested for drug peddling and consumption during a day-and-night raid on Sunday

title: The trust deficit in India-Bangladesh ties
content: Bangladeshi diplomats have pointed out that Dhaka expected less rhetoric on illegal immigration, and more focus on issues such as the renewal of the 1996 Ganga Water Treaty

title: Seven Indians killed, nine hurt in Dubai road accident
content: The accident resulted in seven fatalities and nine injuries, including five serious and four moderate injuries, the Dubai Police said, while adding that all injured were transported to the hospital for treatment

title: Govt cuts subsidised LPG cylinders under Ujjwala from 9 to 4
content: PMUY beneficiaries use about ‘four or five cylinders a year’, Petroleum Ministry says; around 10.55 crore LPG connections given under scheme

title: Not named NDA nominee for Bihar Council poll, RLM chief’s son set to lose Cabinet berth
content: Deepak Prakash, who was sworn in as Minister on May 7, must get elected to either House of the Legislature within six months to retain his Cabinet berth; there is no vacancy in the Council till March 2027

title: Zojila Tunnel to add to Army’s manoeuvrability against Pakistan, China
content: Closure of Kashmir-Ladakh highway for six months during winters due to heavy snowfall restricts the movement of military vehicles, strategic Zojila Tunnel will resolve inaccessibility, enhancing military mobility

title: India expands nuclear arsenal to around 190 warheads, says Stockholm International Peace Research Institute
content: SIPRI Yearbook 2026 notes New Delhi’s ongoing nuclear modernisation programme is increasingly focused on developing longer-range weapons capable of reaching targets across China

title: RBI moves Madras High Court against order to transfer Swami Satyananda’s money to Italy
content: Chief Justice Sushrut Arvind Dharmadhikari and Justice G. Arul Murugan entertain the appeal and stay the single judge’s order

title: INDIA bloc closes ranks around Congress, but not without caveats
content: With defeat of Trinamool Congress in West Bengal and exodus of MPs & MLAs from its ranks, Congress has no challenger within the coalition. Trinamool has also indicated a possible alliance with Congress in 2029 general elections.

title: RS polls: BJP springs a surprise by choosing OBC academician Nagaraja as candidate
content: With the BJP selecting M. Nagaraja, the speculation over former Prime Minister Deve Gowda getting one more opportunity ends

title: Trinamool Congress moves Calcutta HC over LoP row
content: The decision comes days after 58 MLAs floated a rebel bloc led by expelled MLA Ritabrata Banerjee who was recognised by the Speaker as  Leader of the Opposition

title: 24 Indian sailors rescued from ship hit by U.S. missile
content: Marivex sanctioned by the U.S. last December, had earlier carried Iranian oil to India; U.S. Central Command says the tanker violated the ongoing blockade by attempting to sail to an Iranian port; sailors likely to reach India in two days

title: Zero waste CETP, mega leather cluster in Ranipet among steps to improve infra, environmental compliance
content: The plug and play facility at Panapakkam is being developed as a hub for non-leather footwear manufacturing

title: No incriminating material found in data retrieved from TNPDCL’s  stolen hard disks
content: While 18 hard disks were reported stolen, the police found 34 hard disks in the possession of the suspect in Bengaluru. The case has been transferred to CB-CID from the Greater Chennai Police

title: 8 dead, 6 critical after explosion at Rashtriya Ispat Nigam Limited plant
content: The major industrial accident occurred at RINL, the corporate entity of the Visakhapatnam Steel Plant (VSP), when a ladle exploded and released hundreds of tonnes of molten steel; Prime Minister Narendra Modi, Chief Minister Chandrababu Naidu expresses grief over the mishap

title: House pattas will be given to eligible SC/ST families within 5 years: Minister Vanni Arasu
content: He says the initiative to grant house e-pattas was among the government’s top priorities and improving the condition of SC/ST hostels is another of its priorities

title: Congress’ electoral strategy weakened TMC, CPI(M) and DMK: Thirumavalavan
content: Speaking at a meeting of the INDIA bloc in New Delhi, he says the party’s approach has caused dissatisfaction among several constituents and calls upon it to explore ways to further strengthen and consolidate the alliance

title: INDIA bloc in disarray, lacks ground presence: BJP
content: Its constituent parties are grappling with electoral losses and internal conflict while the BJP stays focused on welfare initiatives and measures to make India a developed country, says Sambit Patra

title: BGB delegation arrives in India for border talks with BSF
content: The talks are taking place against the backdrop of tensions between the two border-guarding forces over allegations by Bangladesh that the BSF has been sending undocumented Bangladeshis across the border through multiple land entry points.

title: What is lost and gained in NFHS-6
content: NFHS-6 records gains in child nutrition, maternal care, institutional births and women’s internet use, while also introducing new questions on digital literacy and direct benefit transfers; but the survey’s preliminary fact sheet is thinner than the last round, dropping key indicators such as anaemia, mortality, sex ratio at birth

title: Akhilesh spreading ‘fabricated lies’ about Ram temple, says BJP
content: Temple trust says “nothing noteworthy has come to light yet” in the audit; Akhilesh Yadav calls response “suspicious”; BJP says “narrative of lies will never succeed” and SP will lose 2027 polls

title: Strategic, all-weather Zojila Tunnel between Kashmir and Kargil to see final breakthrough
content: Road Transport and Highways Minister Nitin Gadkari to oversee the final blasting from the Kargil side on June 9; the 13.14 km-long tunnel cuts through the mighty Himalayas at an altitude of 11,578 feet and connects the Kashmir valley with Ladakh’s Kargil

title: Solar firms move Karnataka HC over “unreasonable” domestic-cell mandate
content: The writ petition challenges Ministry of New and Renewable Energy (MNRE) orders that enforce ALMM List-II — the approved list of domestic solar-cell manufacturers — for projects commissioned on or after June 1, 2026

title: Kerala 'Islam-Friendly' Gym Row Deepens Amid Ownership Questions
content: The idea behind the 'Islamic-friendly' gym was to introduce specific time slots that would offer greater privacy for women, including women instructors, and an environment without music during those hours.

title: Trinamool's Sabyasachi Dutta, Bidhannagar Ex-Mayor, Arrested On Extortion Charges
content: Bidhannagar ex-mayor Sabyasachi Dutta has been accused by a businessman of extorting lakhs of rupees back in 2018.

title: "Lovers' Spat": Israeli Envoy On Trump's Iran Ultimatum To Netanyahu
content: Trump, who has reportedly grown increasingly exasperated with Netanyahu, had earlier urged both Israel and Iran to stop "shooting" and said that "final negotiations" towards peace would proceed "subject to ignorance or stupidity getting in its way"

title: US Iran War Live: Iran, Israel Hold Attacks After Trump's Ultimatum To Netanyahu
content: US Iran War LIVE Updates: Iran closed the airspace around Tehran's Imam Khomeini International Airport, the country's main airfield, after the Israeli attack.

title: Why The Rich Keep Betting On Real Estate To Build Long-Term Wealth
content: Many wealthy families build diversified portfolios that include residential, commercial and income-generating properties.

title: 'Bibi, You Will Be On Your Own': Trump Warns Netanyahu Over Renewed Iran War
content: US President Donald Trump told Axios in an interview published on Monday that he warned Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu that he might find himself fighting alone if he went back to war with Iran.

title: Trinamool Rebel, 10 MPs Meet BJP Leaders As Mamata Banerjee Attends INDIA Meet
content: Sources told NDTV that a senior Trinamool MP, who had to travel from Mumbai to Kolkata last evening, had an unplanned layover in Delhi.

title: ChatGPT Maker OpenAI To Debut On Wall Street, Files Paperwork For IPO
content: Much like Anthropic and SpaceX, the company has been losing more money than it makes because of the huge costs of building out the venture.

title: 4 Killed, 10 Injured In Russian Strikes On Ukraine's Kharkiv Region
content: Russian strikes killed four people and wounded 10 others in Ukraine's northeastern Kharkiv region, its governor said early Tuesday.

title: UP Man Accuses Wife Of Killing 7-Month-Old Son Over Affair: Cops
content: The seven-year-old child's father has accused his wife of murdering their son due to affair in UP's Meerut on Monday.

title: Nuclear Arms Spending Hits Record High, China Leads Global Expansion
content: The United States and Russia together hold around 83 percent of the world's nuclear arms stockpile, with more than 5,000 warheads each.

title: Trump Nominates Former Personal Lawyer As Attorney General
content: Blanche, 51, has been serving as acting attorney general since Pam Bondi departed in April. Since then he has pursued a number of indictments against Trump's political enemies.

title: At UN, India Slams Pak's Afghanistan Airstrikes As "Massacre"
content: India called for full compliance with international humanitarian law, including the principles of precaution, distinction, and proportionality, and backed UNAMA's demand for independent investigations to ensure accountability.

title: 6.1-Magnitude Earthquake Hits Cuba, Tremors Felt in Florida
content: A 6.1 magnitude earthquake struck near western Cuba on Monday, shaking buildings in Havana and beyond.

title: Dalit Teen Beaten To Death Over Inter-Caste Friendship In Uttarakhand: Cops
content: An 18-year-old Dalit youth was allegedly beaten to death and his friend severely injured over his friendship with a minor girl from an upper caste community in the Pratapnagar block here, police said on Monday.

title: Netanyahu Gambles Close Trump Ties With Fresh Iran Strikes
content: Iran War: Following Israeli strikes on Beirut's southern suburbs, Iran responded with a barrage of missiles towards Israel, where some officials in turn called for a relentless response.

title: EU Delegation Arrives In Assam for 2-Day Visit To Boost Ties
content: The visit comes as India and the European Union seek to deepen engagement under the India-EU Comprehensive Strategic Agenda adopted earlier this year.

content: Weather Updates Today, Heatwave, IMD Alert LIVE Updates: Delhi NCR expected to receive southwest monsoon from June 25 to June 30, says IMD

title: Zoji La tunnel breakthrough today: Gadkari to visit all-weather Kashmir-Ladakh link
content: the upcoming 13km strategic corridor will provide all-weather connectivity between Kashmir and Ladakh . only three meters of rock remain now and will be blasted before the two ends of the tunnel meet . the tunnel’s end-to-end will improve ventilation and allow work to accelerate on the remaining phases of the project .

title: BJP mocks opposition's charge of ‘vote chori’, cites Tamil Nadu, Kerala
content: the BJP accuses the opposition of hypocrisy as it pointed to poll results in Tamil Nadu and Kerala . DMK is shouting itself hoarse that there was no vote-chori but “ally chori”, he said .

title: Times have changed, premarital sex not moral turpitude, says Supreme Court
content: the supreme court said being in such a relationship cannot be termed as moral turpitude to draw adverse inferences about a person’s character . the authorities must keep in mind this reality and not initiate punitive action on such grounds, it held . a bench of justices came to the rescue of an aspiring police official who had been in a physical relationship with a girl .

title: Allahabad HC takes 4 decades to decide on murder conviction appeal
content: a man was arrested as a 28-year-old in 1983 for shooting dead a person . he waited for more than four decades in the high court for a decision on his appeal against conviction and a life term awarded by a trial court . the bench of justices asked as to what innovative measures could be taken to free the clogged wheels of justice .

title: INDIA bloc claims SIR being used to ‘manipulate’ polls; will write to CJI
content: opposition alliance demands education minister resign for 'betrayal of lakhs of students who have appeared in NEET and CBSE examinations' the inDIA bloc demands that PM Narendra Modi call an all-party meeting to discuss 'worsening economic crisis, intensifying price rise, growing unemployment, and farmers' issues'

title: INDIA bloc to meet every two months; eyes tighter coordination against BJP
content: indian bloc will meet every two months to improve cohesion in its functioning to counter the BJP onslaught . it will discuss an 'organisational structure' for the common platform . the members acknowledged the weakening of the opposition, put in sharp relief by the presence of TMC chief Mamata Banerjee .

title: India calls for peace in West Asia, asks citizens to exit Iran
content: ministry of external affairs calls on all parties to immediately de-escalate tensions, ensure civilians are not harmed and conclude ongoing negotiations for a diplomatic solution . 'this conflict has now lasted over 100 days and has already caused immense human suffering,' the government said .

title: 8 workers killed, several critical in Vizag Steel Plant accident
content: a ladle carrying liquid steel suddenly exploded in the continuous casting department of the plant’s steel melting facility . the explosion caused tonnes of molten steel to pour across the shop floor, killing eight workers on the spot and igniting a massive blaze . several workers suffered burns in what is said to be the worst accident in the plant in a decade .

title: CBSE denies portal glitch, says system fully functional; key questions on OSM review unanswered
content: Manash Pratim Gohain is a seasoned journalist with over two decades at The Times of India, where he has built a rich body of work spanning education policy, politics, and governance. Renowned for his incisive coverage of the National Education Policy (NEP) 2020, accreditation reforms, and skilling initiatives, he has also reported on student politics, urban policy, and social movements. His political reportage—both reflective and news-driven—adds depth to his writing, bridging policy with public impact. Through his 2,500 articles and related outlets, he has emerged as a trusted voice in national discourse, particularly in linking education reform to broader societal change. Read More

title: ED probe into Vijayan’s daughter may further strain Congress-CPM ties
content: ED has intensified its probe into the money laundering allegations against the daughter of former Marxist CM of Kerala, Pinarayi Vijayan . sources in the agency deny that the visit of ED chief Rahul Navin was motivated by the opening created by HC for the probe . this will widen the rift between Congress and CPM .

title: Will TMC rebels push NDA past 300? Breakaway camp claims support of 20 MPs
content: if the numbers hold, rebels would clear the two-thirds threshold needed to shield themselves from anti-defection . the letter was submitted shortly before 1pm marking a dramatic escalation in a rebellion that has simmered over days of phone calls, back-channel outreach and closed-door meetings .

title: ‘Burn the midnight oil’: SC asks CBSE for plan to release Class 12 results by Friday
content: the suprem court ordered the Central Board of Secondary Education to announce results at the earliest . the bench agreed to hear the plea of an overseas student from Saudi Arabia . it asked CBSE to come up with a solution by Friday to ensure the interests of the petitioner and others in a similar situation are protected .
